font-family: “Roboto”; font-size: 36px; font-style: italic; font-weight: bold; text-decoration: underline; } TOURISM CSS Agenda Introduction to CSS Box Model Box Model Backgrounds Introduction background-size background-image Box Properties height width Today’s Agenda What we are going to achieve Background Image Introduction to CSS Box Model Introduction CSS Box model Every HTML element on a web page is a rectangular box Introduction CSS Box model If we want curved corners, we use CSS Desktop View - Code Playground Inspect - Click on Settings Desktop View - Code Playground Inspect Desktop View - Code Playground Inspect Mobile View - Code Playground Click on Settings Mobile View - Code Playground Inspect CSS Box Model Box Properties Each rectangular box has different properties: ● height ● width ● margin ● border ● padding Content height width border padding margin CSS Box Model Box Properties Each rectangular box has different properties: ● height ● width ● margin ● border ● padding Content height width border padding margin CSS Box Model Height & Width Properties Content height width Let’s see ● height ● width CSS Box Model Applying Height to Container Element (div) ~250px ~500px ~115px CSS Ruleset Height .card { background-color: lightblue; text-align: center; height: 250px; } CSS Applying Height to Container Element (div) Output of the Code Snippet 250px CSS Box Model Applying Width to Container Element (div) 250px ~400px CSS Ruleset Width .card { background-color: lightblue; text-align: center; height: 250px; width: 250px; } CSS Applying Width to Container Element (div) Output of the Code Snippet 250px Background Image Styling Background Image Let’s add Background Image instead of Background Color Styling Removing Background Color of Container .card { background-color: lightblue; text-align: center; height: 250px; width: 250px; } background-color: lightblue; CSS .card { text-align: center; height: 250px; width: 250px; } CSS CSS Syntax Adding Background Image .card { background-image: url("IMAGE URL"); ... } PROPERTY VALUE Browser Getting Image URL CSS Syntax Adding Background Image URL .card { background-image: url("https://assets.ccbp.in/frontend/static-website/ocean-bg.jpg"); ... } PROPERTY VALUE CSS Ruleset Background Image .card { background-image: url("https://assets.ccbp.in/frontend/static-website/ocean-bg.jpg"); text-align: center; height: 250px; width: 250px; } CSS Background Image Output of the Code Snippet Quiz Time! How to make the background image ﬁll the complete height and width of the screen? Backgrounds Devices with Various Screen Dimensions Backgrounds Viewport The browser's viewport is the area of the window in which web content can be seen. Backgrounds Viewport Height Viewport Height is based on the height of the user's visible area of a web page (viewport). Backgrounds Viewport Height (vh) 100vh = 100% of the viewport height 50vh = 50% of the viewport height 50vh 100vh Backgrounds Viewport Width (vw) 100vw = 100% of the viewport width 50vw = 50% of the viewport width 100vw 50vw Backgrounds Applying Viewport Height (100vh) .card { background-image: url("https://assets.ccbp.in/frontend/static-website/ocean-bg.jpg"); text-align: center; height: 100vh; width: 250px; } CSS Backgrounds Repeating Vertically Image is small So, background image is repeating vertically Backgrounds Repeating Vertically Vertically repeating Backgrounds Repeating Horizontally In some devices background image may repeat horizontally Horizontally repeating Backgrounds How to address these issues? CSS Syntax Background Size .card { background-size: cover; ... } PROPERTY VALUE Backgrounds Applying Background Size .card { background-image: url("https://assets.ccbp.in/frontend/static-website/ocean-bg.jpg"); text-align: center; height: 100vh; background-size: cover; } CSS Backgrounds Applying Background Size How to Get Image URL from the Internet? Getting URL of an Image Open freepik.com Desktop View Freepik.com Mobile View Freepik.com Desktop View Search for Image Mobile View Search for Image Desktop View Choose an Image Mobile View Choose an Image Desktop View Right Click on the Image Mobile View Long Press on the Image Desktop View Select Open Image in New Tab Option Mobile View Select Open Image in New Tab Option Desktop View Copy your Image URL Mobile View Copy your Image URL Example Adding Background Image .card { background-image: url("https://image.freepik.com/free-photo/abstract-water-ocean-waves-texture-background_117652-6.jpg"); text-align: center; height: 100vh; background-size: cover; } CSS Example Output of the Code Snippet Quiz Time!
